title: Roofing Warranty Summary
full_text:
# Roofing Warranty

The manufacturer warranty for the standing-seam metal roofing system is ten (10) years from substantial completion. Labor warranty for roofing installation is two (2) years. Warranty claims require written notice within 30 days of discovery of a defect.

title: Site Safety Plan — Mobilization
full_text:
# Safety Plan

During mobilization, all workers must complete site orientation, wear hard hats and high-visibility vests, and attend the daily stretch-and-flex meeting. Temporary fencing and gated access control are required before material staging begins. Fall protection is mandatory above 6 feet.

title: Envelope Design Notes
full_text:
# Building Envelope

The vapor barrier approach uses a continuous self-adhered membrane on the warm side of the exterior wall insulation. Penetrations must be sealed with compatible flashing tape. Roof-to-wall transitions follow the manufacturer's detailing package.

title: Specification Section 09 30 00
full_text:
# CSI Section 09 30 00 — Tiling

Provide porcelain tile flooring meeting ANSI A137.1. Thin-set mortar shall comply with ANSI A118.4. Grout joints shall be 1/8 inch unless noted otherwise. Flooring submittals must include slip-resistance data.

title: Specification Section 07 10 00
full_text:
# CSI Section 07 10 00 — Dampproofing and Waterproofing

Below-grade waterproofing shall be a fluid-applied membrane with a minimum dry-film thickness of 60 mils. Division 07 waterproofing submittals require product data, SDS, and applicator certifications before installation.

title: Specification Section 23 00 00
full_text:
# CSI Section 23 — HVAC

Air-handling unit AHU-2 shall provide 12,000 CFM supply air with MERV-13 filtration. Fire damper FD-4 shall be UL-listed and installed per SMACNA. Controls interface to the building management system.

title: Architectural Plans — Level 2
full_text:
# Architectural Plans

Sheet A-501 (revision dated 2024-06-12) includes interior elevations and detail callouts. Detail 3/A-501 shows the Level 2 waterproofing termination at the curtain wall. Room 201 finish notes reference the finish schedule.

title: Mechanical Equipment Schedule
full_text:
# Mechanical Schedule

AHU-2: rooftop unit, 12,000 CFM, cooling capacity 40 tons, heating capacity 350 MBH. Serving Room 201 and the east wing. Long-lead item with 16-week fabrication. Panel coordination with electrical package E is required.

title: Electrical Panel Schedule
full_text:
# Electrical Schedule

Panel LP-2 feeder: 400A, 480Y/277V, fed from switchboard MSB-1. Long-lead switchgear items are tracked in procurement. Electrical package E covers the east wing distribution.

title: RFI Log
full_text:
# RFI Log

RFI-12 (open): Clarification requested on underground utilities conflict near grid line B. Blocks excavation of the east utility corridor until answered. Related to site utilities plan revision pending.

title: Submittal Log
full_text:
# Submittal Log

SUB-07-01: Division 07 waterproofing product data — approved as noted. SUB-09-04: Division 09 flooring porcelain tile — under review. Both satisfy the corresponding specification sections when approved.

title: Addendum 3
full_text:
# Addendum 3

Addendum 3 revises AHU-2 cooling capacity from 35 tons to 40 tons and updates associated duct main sizes on the mechanical plans. Long-lead procurement and RFI coordination for AHU-2 must use the revised schedule.
